resources.string: No latitude/longitude values. Long press in the map where you want to be located.
How many times you want to mock the location? (0 = infinite)
How many seconds between every mock?
Copyright 2018\-2025 Matías Castillo Felmer and contributors
The launcher icon was created by @ArtistDev44 - thank you very much for your work!

Long press where you want to be located in the map and press Apply button. The location will be mocked one or more times accordingly to configuration below. While the mock is running, you can change the location just by long pressing where you want to be. To stop mocking the location, press the Stop button. Note: you must enable Fake Traveler as mock location app in Developers options.
Requires restart - a list of possible values can be found here: https://leaflet-extras.github.io/leaflet-providers/preview/
Both Leaflet and Leaflet-providers are licensed under the BSD 2-Clause License.
Persistent notification shown while FakeTraveler is mocking your location.
Mock location is not enabled. Tap to fix.

FakeTraveler is not selected as the mock-location app.

To fix:
1. Open Developer options.
2. Find "Select mock location app".
3. Choose FakeTraveler.

If Developer options are hidden: open About phone and tap Build number 7 times.
MIUI / HyperOS aggressively kills background apps. Open Security → Permissions → Autostart and enable FakeTraveler, then exclude it from battery saver.
One UI may put FakeTraveler to sleep after 3 days unused. Open Battery → Background usage limits and add FakeTraveler to \"Never sleeping apps\".
ColorOS gates background work behind \"App Auto Launch\". Open Privacy permissions → Startup manager and enable FakeTraveler.
EMUI/HarmonyOS uses a \"Protected apps\" list. Open Battery → App launch and switch FakeTraveler to Manage manually with all three options enabled.
FunTouch OS background restrictions vary. Open Battery → Background power usage and set FakeTraveler to \"Allow background activity\".
For mocking to survive screen-off and Doze, exempt FakeTraveler from battery optimization in system Settings.

plurals.name: Gpx_TooLarge
plurals.item: GPX too large — limit is %1$d point
GPX too large — limit is %1$d points

resources.string: No route imported yet. Tap \"Import GPX route\" first.
